evidence: Read full file. Lines 54, 61, 74-75 accept token query parameter for every protected /api/** request, not only SSE.
Read full file. HS256 signature is checked and role is refreshed from DB/cache by interceptor; weak configured secret is tracked under CAND-003.
Read full file. ThreadLocal is cleared in interceptor afterCompletion.
Read full file. Auth interceptor covers /api/** except explicit public/auth/upload-file GET path. Upload resource handler is public by design.
Read full file. Mail password, COS secret id/key, weak JWT secret, and default DB password are committed as defaults.
Read full file. Routes pass conversation ids to MessageAppService; service owns authorization.
Read full file. listMessages, sendMessage, and markAllRead load by conversation id but never verify current user is participant.
Read full file. selectByConversation/countByConversation filter only by conversation_id and deletion flags; markAllRead lacks participant join.
Read full file. markDeletedByUser uses a selected column; repository chooses b_deleted_at for non-participant, amplifying conversation tampering.
Read full file. deleteByUser silently ignores non-participants in domain object, and getOtherParticipantId returns participantAId for any non-A caller.
Read full file. Upload keys are UUID/date generated server-side, content types/extensions are allowlisted, and image magic bytes are checked.
Read full file. Local path sink lacks containment check, but reviewed upload callers generate non-attacker-controlled keys; record as hardening follow-up, not reportable in this scan.
Read full file. COS keys come from same server-generated path; presigned URL creation uses generated key and content type.
Read relevant full content path. create/update sanitizeArticleContent performs sensitive-word masking only; no HTML escaping before DTOs reach ArticleFeed.
Read full file. highlightHtml returns raw title/summary when no keyword and injects raw replacement into v-html sinks.
Read sanitizer setup. Markdown rendering uses DOMPurify plus style filtering; not the ArticleFeed sink.
Read stream setup. EventSource URL appends token query parameter.
Read stream setup. EventSource URL appends token query parameter.
Read auth header handling. Normal API calls send Authorization header; query-token issue is confined to SSE frontend plus global backend acceptance.
Read admin guard pattern; ensureAdmin checks authenticated user and ADMIN role before privileged admin routes.
Read full file. Admin-only guard protects ad management; ad URL validation is a product-trust issue, not directly exploitable by non-admin users.
Read full file. targetUrl is admin-controlled and rendered as ad navigation; no non-admin source found.

Initial generated rank_input.csv contained 825 rows including .npm-cache, .omc, SQL article seed data/backups, docs, and tests. These were explicitly excluded from deep runtime review because they are not deployed request-handling code; revisit in a supply-chain or data-seed scan.
